name: Ace Driver
description:
You have a natural talent for handling vehicles. You gain the following benefits:
- Increase your Dexterity or Intelligence score by 1, to a maximum of 20.
- You gain proficiency in one type of vehicle of your choice. If already proficient, double your proficiency bonus.
- While driving, the vehicle gains a +2 bonus to AC and advantage on Dexterity saving throws.
- As a bonus action, you can push a vehicle beyond its limits: +10ft speed and it can Dash/Disengage as a bonus action until your next turn (once per short/long rest).
prerequisites: Prerequisite: Proficiency with a type of vehicle

name: Athletic
description:
Your enhanced physical training grants you the following benefits:
- Increase your Strength or Dexterity score by 1, to a maximum of 20.
- Standing up from prone uses only 5 feet of movement.
- Climbing doesn't cost you extra movement.
- Running jumps require only 5 feet of movement.

name: Attentive
description:
Always aware of your surroundings, you gain the following benefits:
- Increase your Intelligence or Wisdom score by 1, to a maximum of 20.
- Advantage on Perception and Investigation checks to detect hidden creatures or objects.
- You can accurately recall anything seen or heard within the past month.

name: Battle Caster
description: You're comfortable casting, even in the chaos of battle.
prerequisites: Requires the ability to cast at least one spell of 1st-level or higher

name: Boundless Reserves
description: You have learned to harness your inner vitality to replenish your ki. You gain the following benefits:
prerequisites: *Wisdom 13 or higher and the Ki class feature*

name: Brutal Attack
description: After making a melee attack, you may reroll any weapon damage and choose the better result. This feat can be used no more than once per turn.

name: Bull Rush
description:
Your headlong rush devastates your foes.
After dashing (with the Dash Action) at least ten feet towards a foe, you may perform a bonus action to select one of the following options.
Attack. Make one melee weapon attack, dealing an extra 5 damage on a hit.
Shove. Use the Shove maneuver, pushing the target 10 feet directly away on a success.

name: Combat Thievery
description: You know how to trade blows for more than inflicting harm.

name: Covert Training
description: You have absorbed some of the lessons of the world of spies, criminals, and others who operate in the shadows. You gain the following benefits:

name: Crafting Expert
description:
You have devoted time to studying and practicing the art of crafting, gaining the following benefits:
This feat can be selected multiple times, choosing a different type of crafted item each time.

name: Crossbow Expertise
description: Crossbows are lethal in your hands.

name: Deadeye
description: Your natural talent or skill makes you lethal with a ranged weapon.

name: Deflector
description:
Your lightning reflexes make you hard to hit.
You may expend your reaction to increase your AC by an amount equal to your proficiency bonus against an attack targeting you in melee.
This feat can only be used while holding a finesse weapon that you're proficient with.

name: Destiny's Call
description: You are more in tune with the nature of who you truly are and what you can become.

name: Diehard
description: You are difficult to wear down and kill. You gain the following benefits:

name: Dual-Wielding Expert
description: You are a whirlwind of steel.

name: Dungeoneer
description: You've honed your senses to subterranean danger and opportunity.

name: Empathic
description: You have a heightened awareness of the feelings and motivations of those around you.

name: Fear Breaker
description: You have a habit of snatching victory from the jaws of defeat. You gain the following benefits:

name: Floriographer
description:
You have studied the secret language of Floriography. You gain the following benefits:
- Increase your Intelligence or Wisdom score by 1, to a maximum of 20.
- You can use flowers to leave secret messages (up to 25 words, 10 min to arrange).
- You can discern if a plant is magical, poisonous, or edible by studying it for 1 minute.
- You can cast 'speak with plants' once per long rest, but only to communicate with non-creature plants.
prerequisites: *Proficiency in one of the following skills: Arcana, History, or Nature*

name: Forest Denizen
description: You are familiar with the ways of the forest. You gain the following benefits:

name: Fortunate
description:
Be it the gods, fate, or dumb luck, something is looking out for you.
You may choose to invoke your luck to do the following:
Multiple creatures with the Fortunate feat may invoke luck. If this occurs, the result is resolved as normal.
You may invoke your luck up to three times per long rest.

name: Friend of the Forest
description: After spending some time in forests, you have attuned yourself to the ways of the woods and the creatures in it.

name: Giant Foe
description: Your experience fighting giants, such as ogres, trolls, and frost giants, has taught you how to avoid their deadliest blows and how to wield mighty weapons to better combat them. You gain the following benefits:

name: Grappler
description: You've developed the skills necessary to hold your own in close-quarters grappling. You gain the following benefits:

name: Guarded Warrior
description: You punish foes that try to target your allies.

name: Hardy Adventurer
description: You can endure punishment that would break lesser beings.

name: Harrier
description:
You have learned to maximize the strategic impact of your misty step. You gain the following benefits:
- Increase your Strength or Dexterity score by 1, to a maximum of 20.
- When you use your Shadow Traveler trait or cast 'misty step', you have advantage on the next attack you make before the end of your turn.
prerequisites: *The Shadow Traveler shadow fey trait or the ability to cast the* misty step *spell*

name: Heavily Outfitted
description: You have learned to fight in heavy armor

name: Heavy Armor Expertise
description: Plate and chain are your fortress.

name: Heraldic Training
description: You have studied the specialized techniques used by the divine agents known as heralds. You gain the following benefits:

name: Idealistic Leader
description: The strength of your principles inspires others to follow you with impressive dedication that makes up for whatever your stronghold lacks. You gain the following benefits:

name: Inner Resilience
description: Your internal discipline gives you access to a small pool of ki points. You gain the following benefits:

name: Intuitive
description: You've trained your powers of observation to nearly superhuman levels.

name: Keen Intellect
description: Your mind is a formidable weapon.

name: Lightly Outfitted
description: You've learned to fight in light armor.

name: Linguistics Expert
description: Your gift for languages borders on the supernatural.

name: Martial Scholar
description: You have taken the time to learn some advanced combat techniques. You gain the following benefits:
prerequisites: Prerequisite: Proficiency with at least one martial weapon

name: Medium Armor Expert
description: Medium armor is like a second skin for you.

name: Monster Hunter
description: You are a peerless slayer of beasts most foul. You gain the following benefits:
prerequisites: Prerequisite: Proficiency with Survival, 8th level or higher

name: Mounted Warrior
description: You fight as if you were born to the saddle.

name: Mystical Talent
description: You've learned to channel the spark of magic in you.

name: Natural Warrior
description: The urge to fight runs hot in your veins and you take to battle naturally. You gain the following benefits:

name: Part of the Pack
description: Wolves are never seen to be far from your side and consider you to be a packmate. You gain the following benefits:

name: Physician
description: Your mastery of mundane healing arts borders on the mystical.

name: Polearm Savant
description: You've honed fighting with hafted weapons, including glaives, halberds, pikes, quarterstaffs, or any other similar weapons.

name: Power Caster
prerequisites: Requires the ability to cast one spell

name: Powerful Attacker
description: You reap a bloody harvest with a two-handed weapon.

name: Primordial Caster
description:
Your blood seethes with elemental power.
Select an elemental damage type (acid, cold, fire, lightning, or thunder).
This feat can be selected multiple times, choosing a different damage type each time.
prerequisites: Requires the ability to cast one spell.

name: Rallying Speaker
description:
Your words can set even the coldest hearts ablaze.
You may deliver a rousing oratory that bolsters your allies. After speaking for ten minutes, you may grant temporary hit points equal to your level + your charisma modifier to up to 6 friendly creatures (including yourself) that hear and understand you within 30 feet. A creature can only gain the benefits of this feat once per long rest.

name: Rapid Drinker
description: Through a lifestyle of hard, competitive drinking, you’ve learned how to quaff drinks at an incredibly accelerated pace. You gain the following benefits:

name: Resonant Bond
description: You lose resonance with an item if another creature attunes to it or gains resonance with it. You can also voluntarily end the resonance by focusing on the item during a short rest, or during a long rest if the item is not in your possession.
prerequisites: You're able to form a greater bond with magic items. During a short rest, you can focus on a non-consumable magic item and create a unique bond with it called resonance. You can have resonance with only one item at a time. Attempting to resonate with another item fails until you end the resonance with your current item. When you resonate with an item, you gain the following benefits:

name: Rimecaster
description: You are from an area with a cold climate and have learned to adapt your magic to reflect your heritage. You gain the following benefits:
prerequisites: *A race or background from a cold climate and the ability to cast at least one spell*

name: Rite Master
description:
You have delved into ancient mysteries.
When you acquire this feat, select from the bard, cleric, druid, herald, sorcerer, warlock, or wizard spell list and choose two 1st level spells with the ritual tag, which are entered into your ritual book. These spells use the same casting attribute as the list from which they were drawn.
When you discover spells in written form from your chosen spell list, you may add them to you your ritual book by spending 50 gp and two hours per level of the spell. In order to copy spells in this manner, they cannot be greater than half your character level, rounding up.
You may cast any spells in your ritual book as rituals so long as the book is in your possession.
prerequisites: Requires intelligence or Wisdom 13 or higher

name: Shield Focus
description: A shield is a nearly impassable barrier in your hands.

name: Skillful
description:
Your versatility makes you an asset in nearly any situation.
Learn three skills, languages, or tool proficiencies in any combination. If you already have proficiency in a chosen skill, you instead gain a skill specialty with that skill.

name: Skirmisher
description: You are as swift and elusive as the wind.

name: Sorcerous Vigor
description: When your magical reserves are low, you can call on your lifeforce to fuel your magic.
prerequisites: *Charisma 13 or higher and the Sorcery Points class feature*

name: Spellbreaker
description: You are a terrifying foe to enemy spellcasters.

name: Stalker
description: You are an expert at hunting prey. You are never more at home than when on a hunt, and your quarry rarely escapes you. You gain the following benefits:

name: Stalwart
description: You can quickly recover from injuries that leave lesser creatures broken.

name: Stealth Expert
description: The shadows embrace you as if you were born to them.

name: Street Fighter
description: You've left a trail of broken opponents in the back alleys and barrooms of your home.

name: Stunning Sniper
description: You have mastered the use of ranged weapons to cripple your target from a distance.

name: Surgical Combatant
description: Your knowledge of anatomy and physiology is a boon to your allies and a bane to your foes. You gain the following benefits:

name: Survivor
description: You use every last ounce of energy to survive, even in the worst of circumstances.

name: Swift Combatant
description: You are naturally quick and use that to your advantage in battle. You gain the following benefits:

name: Tactical Support
description: Your tactical expertise gives your allies an edge in combat.

name: Tenacious
prerequisites: Choose an attribute and raise it by 1, up to the attribute cap of 20, and become proficient with saving throws using the selected attribute.

name: Thespian
description: Your mastery of the dramatic arts is useful both on and off the stage.

name: Weapons Specialist
description: Nearly any weapon is lethal in your hands.

name: Well-Heeled
description: You can maneuver effortlessly through the corridors of power and prestige. You gain the following benefits:
prerequisites: Prerequisite: Prestige rating of 2 or higher

name: Woodcraft Training
description: You have learned to survive in the wilds, a useful skill for almost any adventurer. You gain the following benefits:
